overall.description: Game engine footage from a wizarding school setting, showing a student character walking through gothic castle corridors lined with medieval tapestries, then entering a Theory of Magic classroom filled with other students in robes, wooden tables, and sunlight streaming through tall windows.

character approaches and opens heavy wooden door, transitioning to classroom interior

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a narrow gothic corridor lined with medieval tapestries and stone columns, passing through an iron gate into a larger vaulted hall before approaching a heavy wooden door that leads to the classroom.

scene_state.functional_zone: Theory of Magic classroom with wooden tables and high vaulted ceiling

events.description: text overlay 'Theory of Magic' appears in lower left corner then fades

student with blonde hair standing and gesturing while observing the room

entered.detail: long wooden tables arranged in rows for students to sit at
ornate iron chandelier hanging from the vaulted ceiling
high wooden beamed ceiling with stone arch supports
tall gothic windows letting in bright sunlight beams
large stone fireplace with wooden mantelpiece

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to a spacious classroom with high gothic vaulted ceilings and sunlight streaming through tall windows. Students in wizard robes are seen walking between wooden tables and settling into seats, while the camera remains stationary observing the Theory of Magic classroom environment.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the enclosed intimacy of a gothic corridor into the expansive brightness of a magic classroom. It begins by gliding through a narrow stone hallway lined with medieval tapestries and columns, passing through an iron gate into a larger vaulted hall. As the camera approaches and moves through a heavy wooden door, the confined space opens up into a spacious room with high vaulted ceilings. The scene then shifts from the dim stone passage to a sun-drenched environment where light streams through tall windows, illuminating students in robes as they settle around wooden tables.
